untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit pattern recognition (broadening pattern identification, height/width measurement, trend-line touches) which cannot be expressed using only allowed indicators and operators. Broadening pattern detection requires candlestick sequence analysis, volatility expansion measurement, and geometric pattern validation not available in indicator set. Used Donchian channels as proxy for volatility expansion but this does not capture the specific broadening pattern logic.
translation_notes: Original signal describes a technical chart pattern (broadening/expanding triangle) with performance improvements based on pattern dimensions. The entry conditions require: (1) pattern identification via trend-lines, (2) height comparison to median, (3) width comparison to median, (4) pattern duration validation. None of these can be precisely translated to the allowed indicator set. Used Donchian breakouts with ATR expansion as a rough proxy for broadening pattern behavior, but this is NOT equivalent to the actual pattern detection described in the source material.
